series_metadata.series_title: RENEWAL, REINSTATEMENT AND REACTIVATION APPLICATIONS FOR LICENSURE/CERTIFICATION
series_metadata.series_description: Applications for renewal of licensure and certification.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain 100 years. ; Paper: Retain paper original for 3 months or until transfer to microfilm or electronic media verified. ; Electronic: Retain electronically imaged copy 100 years., Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
